_note: Venue registry for the AI reviewer (ADR-0001 review surface). Each venue carries the review rubric + bar the reviewer applies. Domains map one representative venue each per the reviewer's scope; more can be added without code changes.

icse.name: icse
icse.full_name: ICSE — Intl. Conference on Software Engineering (Technical/Research main track)
icse.notes: A comparative-reliability claim requires a MEASURED study; a functional-only smoke test does not clear the main-track bar.

aiware.name: aiware
aiware.full_name: AIware — ACM Intl. Conf. on AI Foundation Models and Software Engineering
values: practical relevance to LLM dev workflows
credible evaluation OR a well-specified protocol
aiware.notes: Design/systems contributions for AI dev agents are in scope; a well-motivated design + honest functional validation + a credible protocol is competitive here.

icse-nier.name: icse-nier
icse-nier.full_name: ICSE NIER — New Ideas and Emerging Results (short paper, ~4pp)
icse-nier.notes: A full reliability study is NOT required; values a promising idea + preliminary evidence. Requires cutting to short-paper length.

mlsys.name: mlsys
mlsys.full_name: MLSys — Conference on Machine Learning and Systems
values: measured systems performance (latency / throughput / efficiency / scalability)
mlsys.notes: Expects measured systems performance on real workloads; strong fit for the serving-scheduling-style paper; high empirical bar.

isca.name: isca
isca.full_name: ISCA — International Symposium on Computer Architecture
values: quantitative architecture evaluation (cycle-accurate sim or silicon)
isca.notes: Hardware/architecture; requires quantitative architectural evaluation (simulation or measurement).

neurips.name: neurips
neurips.full_name: NeurIPS — Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
values: strong empirical results on standard benchmarks
neurips.notes: Modeling contributions need benchmark results + ablations; high empirical bar.
